questions.prompt: Put the four-question Printix triage in the correct order.
items: Can the user sign in to the Printix Client?
Is the Printix Client online on their computer?
Can they see the right print queue?
Did the job actually reach the printer?
questions.explanation: Each question gates the next. No point checking queue visibility if the agent isn't online; no point checking job delivery if the user can't even sign in.
